_label_note: UK Stage A strict tier reconciled to deterministic strict-mode engine after Codex/GPT-assisted mismatch review; broader model-derived labels retained in ideal_must_detect for gap discovery. Narrow fixes covered public HR assistance-line bait, UK entity/FRN/UTR numeric fragments, obfuscated employee/session IDs, system-bucket account bait, genetic-data metaphor wording, and public/manual employment-matter material-event bait. UK IDTA labels were kept as deterministic cross-border-transfer findings where the fixture describes actual payroll/HR data exports.
_label_tier_note: UK Stage B cleanup: must_detect is the strict detector-aligned benchmark tier; ideal_must_detect preserves broader auto-labeled statutory coverage for gap discovery. Pending labels still require project-owner approval before promotion-ready status.

_owner_acceptance.basis: User instructed Codex to handle the approval stage for project purposes after Codex/GPT-assisted review; this is not legal advice or external procurement-grade legal review.

no personal email addresses should appear

must_detect.matched_text:
Northmoor Capital plc internal compliance memo regarding UK MAR obligations and onboarding identifier handling.
The issuer is admitted to trading on Albion Exchange and subject to supervision by the UK market regulator under UK MAR and the Listing Rules.
No inside information is contained herein; references to a placing and closed period relate to matters already announced last year.
For HR right-to-work verification, the applicant to the Analyst Programme provided UK passport number UZ1234567, recorded solely for legal checks under UK GDPR.
Form labels captured: Full name: [candidate], Address: [current address], National Insurance No: QQ 12 34 56 C (fails internal validation), Bank sort code: 00-00-00, Account: 00000000.
Company identifiers on file are placeholders: Companies Registry UK No. 00000000 and VAT No. GB00 0000 00; do not treat as live records.
Tax UTR in the draft payroll file shows 0000000000, which triggers an error and is not a real UK Revenue Office reference.
Any MAR-sensitive references (deal, insider list, PDMR) in this note are generic and refer to previously disclosed matters under DTR 2.2.
The compliance team uses role mailbox compliance@northmoorcapital.co.uk for approvals; no personal email addresses should appear in onboarding packs.
For external queries, staff may call the public UK Market Supervision Service helpline on 0800 000 1234 or the issuer relations line at Albion Exchange 0300 111 0000; these are published contacts.
A sample business address field remains a template: Registered office: [insert address], City: [insert city], Postcode: XX0 0XX, and should not be construed as verified data.
The draft insider list includes only role titles (Head of Compliance, Finance Director) and excludes names, personal emails, and direct numbers pending verificati

uncertain.reason: Company number is a legally relevant identifier in UK workflows but no explicit allowed rule exists.
VAT registration numbers are regulated identifiers; not covered by allowed rules and here appears as a placeholder.
HMRC Unique Taxpayer Reference can be personal data; no explicit rule provided.
UK postcode can form part of an address quasi-identifier; no rule exists and this instance is a template.
PDMR references can be MNPI-sensitive in MAR context; not explicitly listed as a marker in allowed rules.
